lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Exchuse me... I am trying to tell my verrry good friends 'bout the biggest bull I ever raised.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Exchuse me... I am lishning to my good friend.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Mean pair of horns he'd got.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Got enough leather off 'im for a new carpet.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Grew to the size of a cart, I swear!

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: It's not like that these days.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: 'E went MOO MOO MOO all night.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Never had a year like that since.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: That prize should've been mine!

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Ol' Hosidius thought we'd need a bigger barn.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Best bull I ever 'ad.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: I've got a brand new plough!

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: No-one got so much corn out of one field before.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Sacks and sacks of grain like you've never seen!

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Hosidius says we gotta optimise land use. Bleah!

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Them dwarves won't pay a decent price anymore.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Best harvest we'd ever 'ad.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: 'Course, the weather were better back then.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Fed the kids for a year off 'is beef.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Could 'ave passed for a mammoth.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Ain't no-one ever tipped that bull.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: You've never seen a bull like 'im.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Pearls of wisdom!

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Ah, tell it!

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Best times ever!

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Right you are.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Great days!

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: I'm going to be sick!

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: You're right.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: You're so right.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Those were the days!

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Not like nowadays.
